daily.today_energy: Your inner light is absolutely glowing today, Leo. This is peak season for authentic self-expression—lean into whatever makes you feel most alive. The universe is basically handing you permission to be unapologetically you.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your energy shift, and honestly, they should be. Whether you're single or taken, today calls for real conversations over surface-level small talk. Vulnerability is your superpower rn.
daily.career: Your ideas have serious legs today. Don't just think them—say them out loud. Collaborations flow naturally, and people are actually listening to what you bring to the table. Trust your instincts on that project.
daily.health: Your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. Dance, walk, stretch—whatever keeps your energy flowing upward. Mental clarity follows when you honor what your physical self needs.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is asking you to embrace your authentic self, Leo. There's a magnetic pull toward meaningful conversations and deeper connections. Trust the timing of things unfolding around you.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering sweet possibilities into your orbit. Whether you're coupled or single, emotional honesty is your superpower right now. Let someone see the real you beneath the sparkle.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are firing on all cylinders. This is the week to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or take on a project that genuinely excites you. Your passion is contagious.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for intentional movement and rest in equal measure. Find activities that feel joyful rather than obligatory—dancing, walking, whatever makes you feel alive and grounded.
